title: cyananthus macrocalyx subsp. spathulifolius
intro: Cyananthus macrocalyx subsp. spathulifolius, commonly known as a type of flowering plant in the borage family, is a subspecies of the Cyananthus macrocalyx plant. The medicinal properties of this plant are primarily focused on its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyananthus macrocalyx subsp. spathulifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
